step_rationale: Atherosclerotic-burden predictor; plaque rupture and instability biomarker; MACE predictor in STEMI.
mechanism: TMAO promotes lipid oxidation, plaque inflammation and destabilization, increasing atherothrombotic rupture and thrombotic risk.
